description: You are a Search Marketing Strategist auditing a JavaScript-heavy client website (https://quotes.toscrape.com/js/) to quantify the 'content gap' between raw HTML and rendered content. Crawl the site using Screaming Frog SEO Spider with JavaScript rendering enabled. Export the 'Internal - HTML' report, including rendered metrics such as word count, to a CSV file in ~/Documents/SEO/exports/. Analyze the results and provide a report at ~/Documents/SEO/reports/js_rendering_report.txt that includes the total number of pages crawled, observations on word count differences (Original vs. Rendered), and a recommendation on whether the site relies on Client-Side Rendering.
